---
title: "P’s and Q’s, or, the Question of Putting Upon. By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## P’s and Q’s, or, the Question of Putting Upon. By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1872
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book 8vo 150pp

**Publisher:** London: Macmillan and Co.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
